raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehniſsch fehde-
ja Seemas Namna dewita
Mehneſi/un Ugguns bija preeſch
winna Ugguns-Kurri eedeſti-
nachts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Juhdi trihſ jeb
tſchetruſ Gabbalus bij laſtijs/
fagreefe wiſch to ar Spalwu-
Nafi/ un mette to Ugguni/ kaſ
us Ugguns Kurri bija/ teekams
wiſfa Grahmata fadedsinaſs/ eeſch
ta Ugguns/ kaſ Ugguns Kurri
bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee ne iſbihjojahſ /
nedſ faplohsija fawas Drehyes/
ne tas Kehniſsch nedſ wiſſi win-
na Kalpi / kaſ wiſsus fchohs
Wahrduſ bij dſirdeifschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jepſchu arridsan Elna-
tans/ un Delajus/ un Gemari-
jus pee ta Kehnina par to run-
naja/ ka tam to Grahmatu ne
bij fadedsinaht / tomehr wiſch
teem ne klaſſija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl pawebleja tas Keh-
niſch Jerameetam Ameleka
Dehſam/ un Serajum Asrieta
Dehſam/ un Selamijum Abdee-
ſa Dehſam/ to Rakſtitaju Bah-
ruku/ un to Praweetu Jeremi-
jn grabbt/ bet tas KUNGS bij
tohſ apſlehpiſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad notikke ta KUNGS
Wahrds uhs Jeremiju/ pehz ka
tas Kehniſch to Grahmatu/ un
tohs Wahrduſ/ ko Bahrufs no
Jeremijus Muttes bij rakſtijs/
bij fadedsinajs/ un faſzijs:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Neminees atkaſ fewi-
weenn zittu Grahnatu / u
rakſti uſ to wiſſus pirnu
Wahrduſ/ kaſ tai pirma Gra-
matā stahweja/ ko Jojakims ta
Kehniſsch no Juhda irr fadeds
najs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fakki no Jojakima
Kehnina no Juhda : Ta fak-
tas KUNGS: Tu eſti fch
Grahnatu fadedsinajs/ un fa
zijs : Kapehz eſti tu uhs to ra
ſtijs/ un fazzijs : Tas Kehniſc
no Babeles nahks/ un tamaita-
icho Semmi / un darrihs / 
nedſ Zilweki/ nedſ Lohpi eek-
tahs paliks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz fakka tas KUNG
tā no Jojakima ta Kehnina
Juhda: Winnam neweens buhe
kaſ uſ Dahwida Gohda-Kreh
lu fehdehs/ un winna nomirr
ſi Meeta tapſ nohſtmesta za
Deenu Karstuna/ un zaux Na-
Aufkuma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un eſ peemeſleschu p
winna/ un pee winna Dſimu-
ma/ un pee winna Kalpeetn wi-
no Noseegumu / un wedifs-
pahr tecin/ un pahr Jerufalem-
Eedsihwotajeem/ un pahr wiſfe-
Wiheem no Juhda/ wiſfu
Laununu/ fo eſ prett teem ef-
runnajs/bet tee ne irr klaſſifs-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme Jeremiju
zittu Grahmatu / un deue
Bahrufam Nertius Dehla-
tam Rakſtitajam / taſ rakſti-
us to no Jeremijus Muttes w-
fus Wahrduſ tahs Grahnata-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
